    Modifier and Type
    Method

    static void
    PlaylistDialogHandler.showCreateDialog(PlaylistService playlistService, PlaylistController controller)
    Opens the "New Playlist" dialog and creates the playlist on confirm.
    static void

    Opens the delete confirmation dialog.
    static void

    Opens the rename dialog for an existing playlist.
